Broccoli is a type of vegetable that belongs to the Brassica family. It is a cool-season crop that grows on a plant with thick stalks and green, tree-like leaves. Broccoli is typically grown in well-drained soil and requires a period of cold weather to induce flowering. It is often cultivated in gardens and can also be grown indoors in containers.
